name: Ivory Peony Bouquet
description: A breathtaking bouquet of hand-finished ivory peonies, each petal delicately shaped to mirror nature's finest work. This arrangement brings a sense of romantic sophistication to bedrooms, living rooms, and entryways alike.
features: Suitable for indoor and covered outdoor use
material: Premium silk, plastic stems with wire core

name: Blush Rose Arrangement
description: Delicate blush-toned roses artfully arranged to evoke the romance of an English country garden. Each rose is crafted with multi-layered petals for a stunningly realistic appearance.

name: Lavender Wildflower Bundle
description: Rustic charm meets effortless elegance in this lavender wildflower bundle. Perfect for creating a Provençal-inspired atmosphere in kitchens, shelves, and side tables.
features: Pairs beautifully with our ceramic vases

name: Golden Sunflower Spray
description: Brighten any space with these cheerful golden sunflowers. Their oversized blooms and textured centres create an eye-catching display that radiates warmth year-round.

name: White Orchid Phalaenopsis Stem
description: The epitome of minimalist luxury — a single phalaenopsis orchid stem with cascading blooms and realistic leaves. Place it in a clear glass vase for an instant designer statement.

name: Dusty Rose Hydrangea Cluster
description: Voluminous hydrangea clusters in a muted dusty rose hue — perfect for creating full, lush arrangements with just a few stems. Each cluster features dozens of individual florets.

name: Cherry Blossom Branch
description: Bring the magic of spring indoors with these delicate cherry blossom branches. Ideal for tall vases, mantelpiece displays, or as a standalone accent piece.

name: Mixed Dahlia Bouquet
description: A designer-curated bouquet of mixed dahlias in warm autumn tones — burnt orange, deep burgundy, and champagne. A statement piece for dining tables and mantels.

name: Monstera Deliciosa Plant
description: Our signature Monstera Deliciosa features iconic split leaves with natural-looking variegation. Standing at nearly 4 feet, it makes a stunning floor statement in any modern interior.
material: PE plastic leaves, real-touch coating, ceramic pot

name: Potted Olive Tree
description: A Mediterranean-inspired potted olive tree that adds architectural interest to hallways, patios, and reading nooks. Features realistic olive fruits and silvery-green leaves.
material: PE leaves, natural wood trunk, ceramic pot

name: Fiddle Leaf Fig Tree
description: The interior designer's favourite — our fiddle leaf fig features oversized, violin-shaped leaves with realistic veining. A sculptural piece that anchors any room.
material: PE plastic, real-wood trunk, weighted pot

name: Hanging Pothos Vine
description: Cascading golden pothos vine that drapes beautifully from shelves, mantels, and hanging baskets. Each leaf features realistic colour gradients from green to golden yellow.

name: Eucalyptus Garland
description: A lush eucalyptus garland ideal for draping across mantels, staircase banisters, or wedding arches. The silvery-green leaves create a naturally elegant atmosphere.

name: Snake Plant (Sansevieria)
description: Sleek, architectural snake plant with sword-like leaves in dark green with golden edges. Perfect for modern, minimalist spaces — bookshelf nooks, office desks, or bathroom counters.

name: Bird of Paradise Plant
description: A tropical showstopper — our Bird of Paradise features dramatic, broad banana-like leaves that create instant resort vibes. Perfect as a floor plant in living rooms and lobbies.
material: PE leaves, real-touch coating, rattan pot

name: Lucky Bamboo Stalks Arrangement
description: A contemporary arrangement of lucky bamboo stalks in a clear glass vase with faux water and river pebbles. Brings Zen-inspired tranquility to desks, shelves, and side tables.
material: PE plastic, glass vase, resin water

name: Ribbed Ceramic Vase — Snow White
description: A sculptural ribbed ceramic vase in pristine snow white. Its organic, undulating form adds texture and dimension to any shelf or tabletop — stunning with or without blooms.
features: Watertight — also works with fresh flowers

name: Gold Geometric Planter
description: A striking Art Deco-inspired geometric planter with a brushed gold finish. Its angular facets catch the light beautifully, making it a decorative object in its own right.
features: Also works as a decorative object

name: Rustic Terracotta Urn Planter
description: A classic urn-shaped planter in warm terracotta with an intentionally aged patina. Pairs beautifully with our olive tree or eucalyptus garland for a Mediterranean feel.

name: Clear Glass Cylinder Vase Set
description: A set of three clear glass cylinder vases in graduated heights. Clean, contemporary lines let your flowers take centre stage. Perfect for orchid stems and minimal arrangements.

name: Black Marble Bud Vase
description: A sleek bud vase carved from genuine black marble with natural gold veining. Designed for single stems — a white orchid or cherry blossom branch creates a museum-worthy display.

name: Woven Rattan Plant Basket
description: A hand-woven rattan basket that adds warm, bohemian texture to your space. Use it to house our floor plants or as standalone storage for throws and magazines.

name: Hammered Copper Vase
description: An artisan-crafted vase in warm hammered copper with an antique patina. The hand-hammered texture catches light in the most beautiful way. A true conversation piece.

name: Speckled Stone Planter Pot
description: A Japanese-inspired speckled stone planter with wabi-sabi charm. Its organic imperfections make each piece unique. Ideal for succulents, small plants, and bonsai displays.

name: Botanical Canvas Print Set
description: A museum-quality set of three botanical canvas prints featuring vintage-style illustrations of ferns, palms, and monstera leaves. Printed on gallery-wrap canvas with a subtle linen texture.

name: Preserved Moss Wall Art Frame
description: A stunning piece of living wall art made with preserved reindeer moss in a sleek black frame. Brings the tranquility of nature indoors — no watering, no sunlight needed.

name: Eucalyptus & Lavender Wreath
description: A romantic wreath blending silvery eucalyptus leaves with sprigs of lavender. Gorgeous on front doors, above mantels, or as a window accent. Evokes a Provençal herb garden.

name: Gold Metal Leaf Wall Sculpture
description: A statement 3D wall sculpture featuring oversized ginkgo leaves in hand-painted gold. Creates a dramatic focal point above sofas, beds, or console tables.

name: Macramé Hanging Plant Holder
description: A hand-knotted macramé plant holder in natural cotton. Suspend it from ceiling hooks or wall brackets to create a boho green corner with your favourite hanging plant.

name: Pressed Flower Glass Frame
description: A floating glass frame showcasing beautifully arranged pressed flowers — a piece of art frozen in time. The brass-finish frame adds an elegant, vintage touch.

name: Tropical Leaf Metal Wall Art
description: A pair of oversized tropical leaf silhouettes in matte black metal. Clean, graphic lines create a modern botanical accent perfect for gallery walls and statement spaces.

name: Boho Dried Grass Wall Hanging
description: A textured wall hanging featuring preserved pampas grass and dried palm fans on a wooden dowel. Adds warmth, movement, and bohemian character to bedrooms and nurseries.

name: Grand Peony Centerpiece
description: A lavish centrepiece of overflowing peonies in blush, ivory, and champagne — designed to be the heart of your dining table. Arrives in a gold-rimmed glass bowl.

name: Geometric Succulent Terrarium
description: A pentagon-shaped glass terrarium filled with lifelike succulents, pebbles, and decorative sand. A modern, desktop-friendly centrepiece for offices and side tables.

name: Rose Gold Candelabra Arrangement
description: A dramatic centrepiece combining a rose gold candelabra with cascading greenery and cream roses. Perfect for formal dining, weddings, and festive entertaining.

name: Floating Orchid Bowl
description: White orchid heads floating in a shallow glass bowl with faux water and river pebbles. A serene, spa-inspired centrepiece for coffee tables and bathroom vanities.

name: Magnolia Branch in Ceramic Vase
description: A sculptural magnolia branch with oversized cream blooms, presented in a handmade ceramic vase. Each bloom and bud is individually wired for natural positioning.

name: Luxury Mixed Floral Basket
description: A luxurious arrangement mixing roses, ranunculus, and baby's breath in a woven willow basket. A timeless piece for entryway consoles, gift-giving, and occasions.

name: Mini Bud Vase Trio with Blooms
description: Three charming mini bud vases — ceramic, glass, and brass — each with a single exquisite bloom. Scatter them along a dining runner or line them on a windowsill.

name: Tropical Leaf Console Arrangement
description: A modern arrangement of tropical leaves — monstera, palm, and bird of paradise — in a matt black vase. Architectural and dramatic, designed for console and side tables.

name: Diwali Marigold Garland Set
description: A set of five vibrant marigold garlands in saffron and golden yellow — the essence of Diwali celebrations. Drape them across doorways, pooja rooms, and balcony railings.

name: Christmas Pine Wreath with Berries
description: A lush Christmas wreath of frosted pine, red berries, pine cones, and a velvet ribbon. Hang it on your front door to welcome the holiday season in classic style.
material: PE pine, fabric berries, natural pine cones

name: Spring Tulip Table Arrangement
description: Celebrate spring with a cheerful arrangement of multicoloured tulips in a white ceramic pitcher. Real-touch petals and natural green stems make these utterly convincing.

name: Pooja Lotus & Floating Candle Set
description: A serene set of floating lotus flowers and LED tealight candles — perfect for urli bowls during Diwali, Navratri, or daily pooja. The lotuses open and close realistically.

name: Autumn Maple Leaf Garland
description: Capture the warmth of fall with this richly-hued maple leaf garland. Drape it across mantels, staircase banisters, or use it as a table runner for Thanksgiving and harvest celebrations.

name: Wedding Rose Arch Flower Kit
description: A stunning flower kit designed to transform any arch or backdrop into a romantic wedding feature. Includes clusters of roses, peonies, and trailing greenery with zip-tie attachments.

name: Floral Rangoli Mat — Holi Edition
description: A vibrant, pre-made floral rangoli mat in festive colours — just unroll and place at your doorstep. Features petals, mirrors, and LED fairy lights for a magical entrance.
material: Velvet base, fabric petals, LED lights

name: Eid Crescent Moon Door Hanger
description: A gold crescent moon door hanger adorned with white roses, jasmine, and greenery — a beautiful Eid Mubarak welcome for your home. Handcrafted with love and attention to detail.
